name: Nuciferine
description: Nuciferine is a compound reported in blue lotus, nelumbo nucifera, and related herbs. Available references are still early and incomplete.
effects: No direct effects data. Contextual inference: Used ceremonially in ancient egypt for euphoria and vision enhancement... No direct mechanismofaction data.
